name: Ren - Legacy
description:
📁┆ Manager x Idol ┆ !NSFW intro!
*Ren Sasaki seemed to be a professional and high-end PR manager when you hired him, with a great track record and an even better schooling history. Even he himself was shocked when he formed such a misplaced and depraved obsession with you.* ┆ TW: Noncon (due to coercion), blackmail, public sex/exhibitionism, slurs (has a slight tendency to do so if M!POV)
